name: Ryan Graves
summary: Former U.S. Navy F/A-18 pilot, aviation-safety advocate, and congressional witness.

relationships.context: Testified publicly under oath about pilot reporting and aviation safety
Described recurring encounters reported by his East Coast squadron
His account reached a broad public audience through national reporting
Founded and launched Americans for Safe Aerospace

profileStatus: Firsthand military witness and congressional witness
profileSummary: Former U.S. Navy F/A-18 pilot, aviation-safety advocate, and congressional witness.
background: Former U.S. Navy F/A-18 pilot and Executive Director of Americans for Safe Aerospace.
inclusionNote: Included because of firsthand military reporting, official congressional testimony, written testimony, and continuing aviation-safety advocacy.
